_comment: Maps each task to its correct AOI label. Used to derive accuracy from student_responses.csv. The correct_aoi value must match the AOI name in task_correct_aoi_map.json exactly.
_response_format: student_responses.csv uses 1=correct, 0=incorrect, blank=no response. See data_collection_manual.md Part C.

findYummy._verify: Confirm which Rectangle contains the hidden word YUMMY

frogInBathroom._verify: Confirm Rectangle covers the plant/bathtub area where frog hides

headphoneInBathroom._verify: Confirm Rectangle covers the robe/towel area where headphones hide

frog._verify: Confirm which Rectangle covers the frog that is visually different from others

whoCheats._verify: Confirm Rectangle 4 covers the cheating student
